nasb.text: The sixth for the sixth month was Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: Sixth, for the sixth month, was Ira, the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 六月第六班的軍長是提哥亞人益吉的兒子以拉，他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 提哥亚人益吉的儿子以拉负责第六班，在六月当值，他班内有两万四千人。
